{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Lirial Traveler
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|A [[Lirial Traveler]] has a duty to watch the walls of [[Enosh]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c5">''City of Light'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Leah]] is a [[Lirial Traveler]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c7">''City of Light'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
